summary: Completed testing of MEDVET TV Video Portal feature. All 13 features tested successfully: /videos page with MEDVET TV header, 19 video cards with 'Em breve' badges, tag filtering, video modal, social media section, Header/Sidebar navigation, and backend APIs.
passed_tests: Video Portal page (/videos) loads with MEDVET TV header
/videos shows tag filter buttons (Todos, bem-estar, acupuntura, fitoterapia, homeopatia, CBD, dor, ansiedade, nutrição, pelagem, reabilitação, energia, comportamento)
/videos shows 19 video cards with 'Em breve' badges
Clicking a video card shows modal with 'Em breve' message
Tag filtering works - clicking 'acupuntura' shows only acupuntura videos (1 video)
Social section at bottom shows Instagram, TikTok, YouTube cards with 'Em breve'
Sidebar menu has 'MEDVET TV' item linking to /videos
GET /api/videos returns 19 videos with correct structure
GET /api/social/config returns Instagram, TikTok, YouTube config (all not configured)
Homepage therapies still work - click to expand shows text + video reference ('Vídeo sobre esta terapia em produção')
seed_data_creation: 19 videos defined in THERAPY_VIDEOS constant in server.py (all placeholders with has_video=false)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video Portal (MEDVET TV) feature fully tested. All 19 videos are placeholders (has_video=false) - this is expected as Sora 2 video generation failed due to API key issues. Social media integrations (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube) show 'Em breve' as env vars not configured. Routes tested: /videos, /. Navigation: Header 'Vídeos' link and Sidebar 'MEDVET TV' item both work correctly.

mocked_apis.Social_media: Structure only - env vars not configured

homepage_therapy_video_reference.message: Vídeo sobre esta terapia em produção
